data.title: Advita Ortho Showcases New AI-Driven Research Advancing Personalized Joint Replacement
data.description: Advita Ortho, a prominent medical technology leader, showcased cutting-edge machine learning knee classification in a podium presentation at the Orthopaedic Research Society event held in Gainesville, Fla., on April 6, 2026. The presentation touched on 16 pioneering research studies, expanding insights into shoulder radiomics.

data.title: Export Crating Explained in HelloNation Featuring Logistics Experts Ed and Stacey Pinson
data.description: In a report released on April 6, 2026, from Greenville, South Carolina, the selection process of compliant and reliable crating partners for safe and efficient international shipping by freight forwarders was discussed. The article highlights the key factors that freight forwarders need to consider when choosing the appropriate crate for global transportation. This selection process is crucial for ensuring the safety and security of goods during transit, with a focus on factors such as durability, material quality, size compatibility, and cost-effectiveness. Proper decision-making in selecting crating partners ultimately contributes to smooth and successful international shipping operations, reducing the risk of damages and delays.

data.title: Mastercam Partners with camInstructor® to Develop the Next Generation of CNC Programmers
data.description: In an effort to combat the manufacturing skills gap, a recent partnership has been formed to integrate classroom-ready curriculum into the Mastercam Educational Suite at zero extra expense for educators. This initiative, announced on April 6, 2026, in Tolland, Conn., aims to provide valuable training to individuals. Mastercam, recognized as the leading CAM software globally, and a division of Sandvik, has spearheaded this collaboration. The program offers educators access to essential resources, aiding in the upskilling of students.

data.title: Consertus Appoints Cory Dow, PE as Chief Synergy Officer
data.description: In Miami, Cory Dow, PE has been appointed as the Chief Synergy Officer by Consertus. Dow will oversee the coordination of synergies across the company, as well as drive national expansion efforts in the water and wastewater sector and integrate technology from mergers and acquisitions.
